stories.title: Nearly Half of Italy's Wolves Are Part Dog Now, Thanks to Hybridization. Is That a Threat to the Species?
stories.summary: Wolf-dog hybrids are growing far more common in Italy, raising scientists’ concerns for the future of the wolves

stories.title: Cancer Survivors Are Living Longer but Still Have Complex Needs. That's Why Doctors and Advocates Want Post-Treatment Care Plans
stories.summary: Survivors have a heightened risk of developing cardiovascular disease, pain, insomnia, psychosocial distress and new cancers. Many, patient advocates say, are not receiving adequate long-term care

stories.title: Butterflies Are in Dramatic Decline Across North America. A Close Look at the Western Monarch Shows Why
stories.summary: Pesticides, habitat loss and climate change have taken their toll on the beloved insects. But the experts working with them still find hope for their future

stories.title: Camera Traps Reveal Iberian Lynxes Soaking Their Prey, a First-Ever Discovery Among Carnivores
stories.summary: Scientists speculate that the wild cats are trying to improve hydration or ease their cubs’ transition to solid food. The finding points to resilience in one of the world’s most endangered felines

stories.title: Ancient Humans Mastered Fire. Now, Burning Fossil Fuels and Blazing Landscapes Threaten to ‘Undo the World’
stories.summary: Intensifying wildfires across the continent are spewing air pollution, putting human health at risk, particularly Americans living with chronic illnesses
